text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's evening, and I'm in my room crafting a plan to help Nature beat
Tokai Teio at the Tracen Meet.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Attack! Good evening, it's your beloved trainee!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for coming by so late, Trainer. I forgot some stuff in the trainer
office, sooo... mind lending me the keys?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, it'd be a hassle to return them tonight, so I'll unlock the
room for you tomorrow.
choice_data_list: It's already late, so why don't we go together?
It's already late, so why don't we go together?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, um, that's...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll be f-fine! Just who do you take me for? I'm not a damsel in
distress, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's that, so hurry it up! Gimme the keys already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little curious about the way Nature is acting, but I hand the keys
over to her anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My thanks! And with that, a good night to you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: R-r-r-ring!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Is this Nature's trainer? This is Fuji Kiseki, dorm leader of Ritto
Dormitory, speaking.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's already an hour past curfew, but Nature hasn't come back yet.
Would you have any ideas as to where she might be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no time to panic! First, I should check the trainer's office!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run through the dimly-lit academy, finally arriving in front of the
trainer's office.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Coming around from the outside is none other than Tokai Teio! It's
the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio leaps into the front! She breaks out of the pack... and
across the line! Winning by two whole lengths, Tokai Teio takes home
the gold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opening the door, I find Nature staring intently at footage of Tokai
Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yawn... O-o-ow... neck... stiff.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still... win after win after win. Her positioning near the end there was
flawless—practically textbook.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Once she gets into her groove, there's no stopping her... Yikes, I'm
getting the heebie-jeebies.
choice_data_list: Are you researching Teio by yourself?
Are you researching Teio by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-whooooa?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! N-no way—why're you here?!
choice_data_list: I got a call from your dorm leader.
I got a call from your dorm leader.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: From Fuji?! Why did she... Ahhh! The curfew!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Augh, I totally lost track of the time. Oh man, that's so dumb!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she got sucked into researching Tokai Teio and didn't
realize it was this late already.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um... Sorry about lying to you earlier. Here's the key. I'll go apologize
to Fuji too.
choice_data_list: You want to beat Tokai Teio, don't you?
You want to beat Tokai Teio, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Nah, it's not—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...It's not that simple.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I told you plenty of times, haven't I? That... I'm not built like the
others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a hint of frustration in her tone, Nature slowly walks towards the
window before gazing up at the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm not like those dazzling stars—I can't shine like they do. I'm not the
main character of this story.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course, there was a time when I thought I was, y'know? I wouldn't
have come to Tracen otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But now... I know the the cold, hard truth.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No matter how fast I run, there's always someone out there who's
faster.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone cheered me on—even threw me a send-off fit for a queen.
But when I'm next to real stars, there's no way I can compare to their
radiance.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
To put it simply, I'm just one of those extras you see all the time in
movies.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm not cut out for the leading role... I know that better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
An extra like me has no business aiming for first... It's pathetic, isn't
it?
choice_data_list: You're not pathetic in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list:
When you give it your all, you shine brighter
than any other star.

When you give it your all, you shine brighter
than any other star.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I-I can't shine like the others. So stop it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Please... just stop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks firmly, but when I look at her, her eyes seem to waver.
Perhaps my words reached her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, we go back to Nature's dorm and apologize to Fuji
Kiseki together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, after training...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? After this, you mind if I check out some Teio footage
again?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, don't get me wrong, okay? It's not because I'm super pumped
about facing Teio. Not even close.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's just... well...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even if first place is out of reach... even if victory is impossible... I-I
still want to say that I tried my best...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Mhm. Well, let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two us begin dedicating every waking moment to training
for the upcoming Tracen Meet.
